allow: Bash(cat ~/.claude.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('mcpServers',{}\), indent=2\)\)" 2>/dev/null || cat ~/.claude.json 2>/dev/null | node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(j.mcpServers||{},null,2\)\)")
